title: Vanilla+ Visuals by Shae
description: The goal of this modpack is to enhance the visuals of the game in a style that most closely resembles vanilla Minecraft, without changing gameplay (including QOL) using the least amount of mods
body: The goal of this modpack is to enhance the visuals of the game in a style that most closely resembles vanilla Minecraft, without changing gameplay (including QOL) using the least amount of mods. The pack is also supported by a minimal number of performance mods, and a couple of utility mods that slightly break the “vanilla gameplay” rule.
